meta.source: replanned 2026-05-02: expanded scope beyond q-exit to bt-shooter ticker leak + Windows compatibility
meta.maintained: Takumi must update this file after every sub-task completion

globalAlerts.warning: The diff spans 11 files across 3 fix categories. The Rule of Two review must examine diff vs HEAD on ALL files, not just the originally-staged q-exit subset.

Full verification is the exact three-target gauntlet: gmake -j 10 make-all-with-log (macOS), gmake -j 10 make-all-in-container (Linux), gmake -j 10 make-all-run-windows (Windows). All three MUST pass on the same final diff.

Windows ConPTY tests now have a runtime probe that skips on hosts with 0xc0000142 child console init failure. This is intentional — do not remove the skip without understanding the Windows CI environment.
The pr_split_00_core.js absolutePath/fileExistsSync functions MUST NOT break existing PATH-based lookup — the absolute-path branch is an early-return short-circuit only.

mandatoryDirectives.contextRefresh: Read blueprint.json and WIP.md at session start
mandatoryDirectives.incrementalUpdate: Update task status after EVERY sub-task, never batch updates
mandatoryDirectives.noEstimates: Perfection isn't cheap — no effort estimates allowed
mandatoryDirectives.noPriorities: All tasks are mandatory — no prioritization
mandatoryDirectives.diffFreeze: After Rule of Two pass 1 succeeds, freeze the diff until pass 2 completes

statusSection.currentState: COMPLETE. All three full-build gauntlets pass (macOS ✓, Linux ✓, Windows ✓). Two contiguous Rule of Two PASS reviews on the same 12-file diff. All tasks Done. Ready to confirm fitness and commit.
statusSection.goalState: All 11 files are staged as one coherent diff. The three-target full-build gauntlet (macOS, Linux container, Windows) passes on that diff. Two contiguous subagent reviews pass on diff vs HEAD. The commit is ready.
replanLog: 2026-05-01: Initial plan for q-exit fix only, targeting staged diff on 4 files.
2026-05-01: macOS gauntlet failure revealed bt-shooter ticker leak. Scope expanded to fix scripts/example-04-bt-shooter.js.
2026-05-01: Windows gauntlet failure revealed 3 surfaces: pr_split absolute-path lookup, ConPTY host probe, and env block dedup. Scope expanded to 11 files.
2026-05-02: Full replan. Prior plan tasks 1-6 are stale (described investigation already completed). New plan reflects the actual 11-file diff and what verification remains.

sequentialTasks.task: Consolidate all unstaged changes into a single staged diff
sequentialTasks.description: The working tree has 8 unstaged modified files (pr_split_00_core.js, pr_split_autosplit_recovery_test.go, pr_split_conflict_retry_test.go, pr_split_integration_test.go, pty_test.go, pty_windows.go, example-04-bt-shooter.js, blueprint.json) and 4 already-staged files (blueprint.json, pick_and_place_quit_exit_test.go, tui_manager.go, example-05-pick-and-place.js). Stage all unstaged modifications so the entire 11-file diff is coherent in the index. Run `git add` on each unstaged file individually.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: `git diff --cached --stat` shows all 11 changed files. `git diff` (unstaged) shows no remaining modifications. The index represents one unified diff for review.

sequentialTasks.task: Run macOS full-build gauntlet on the consolidated diff
sequentialTasks.description: Execute `gmake -j 10 make-all-with-log` from the repository root. This runs the configured all target (build + lint + test) on macOS with GO_TEST_FLAGS=-timeout=20m, emitting build.log. The diff now includes the bt-shooter fix and Windows compat changes that must not break macOS.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: The make-all-with-log target exits zero. build.log shows a clean all-target run on macOS for the complete 11-file diff.

sequentialTasks.task: Run Linux container full-build gauntlet on the consolidated diff
sequentialTasks.description: Execute `gmake -j 10 make-all-in-container` from the repository root. This runs the dockerized Linux build+lint+test target. The pr_split_00_core.js absolutePath function uses `/` as the Unix absolute-path check, and the test mocks now accept both `which` and `where.exe` — Linux must still resolve via `which` only.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: The make-all-in-container target exits zero. The Linux container all-target run completes successfully on the complete diff.

sequentialTasks.task: Run Windows full-build gauntlet on the consolidated diff
sequentialTasks.description: Execute `gmake -j 10 make-all-run-windows` from the repository root. This runs `hack/run-on-windows.sh moo make all GO_TEST_FLAGS=-timeout=20m`. The Windows fixes include: absolutePath short-circuit in pr_split core (handles C:\ and UNC paths), `where.exe` in test mocks, ConPTY runtime probe that skips on 0xc0000142, and env block dedup/sort in pty_windows.go.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: The make-all-run-windows target exits zero. Windows all-target run completes successfully with ConPTY tests either passing or correctly skipping via the runtime probe.

sequentialTasks.task: If any gauntlet target fails, capture root cause and fix
sequentialTasks.description: If any of the three targets fails, inspect build.log or command output to identify the first concrete failing package/test/file. Record the root cause in WIP.md under a new 'Failure Surface' section. Fix only the implicated files. The fix must preserve all other changes. Then re-run the failed target to confirm the fix before re-running the full gauntlet.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: The concrete failure surface is identified at file:line level, the root cause is recorded in WIP.md, and a targeted fix is applied that eliminates the failure without introducing regressions visible on the other two platforms.

sequentialTasks.task: Rule of Two review pass 1 on diff vs HEAD
sequentialTasks.description: Spawn a fresh review subagent using the strict-review-gate skill prompt. The review scope is `git diff --cached` (the entire 12-file consolidated diff vs HEAD). Direct the subagent to write its review artifact to ./scratch/review-pass-1.md. The subagent must examine: (1) the __postBubbleTeaExit/__skipREPL pattern in both JS scripts and tui_manager.go, (2) the absolutePath/fileExistsSync short-circuit in pr_split_00_core.js and its test coverage, (3) the ConPTY runtime probe in pty_test.go, (4) the dedupEnv/env-block sort in pty_windows.go, (5) the test mock changes for where.exe compatibility, (6) the ctxutil TestRunExec_Basic cross-platform fix.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: The first review subagent returns PASS with no unresolved findings. If findings exist, they are addressed and this task restarts.

sequentialTasks.task: Rule of Two review pass 2 on the identical diff vs HEAD
sequentialTasks.description: Without changing the codebase after pass 1, spawn a NEW review subagent with an effectively identical prompt and the same diff-vs-HEAD scope. Write its artifact to ./scratch/review-pass-2.md. This must be a different subagent instance with no shared state from pass 1.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: The second review subagent returns PASS on the exact same diff, producing the contiguous pair required by strict-review-gate. Two PASS reviews exist in ./scratch/ for the same diff.

sequentialTasks.task: Confirm fitness for purpose across all three fix categories
sequentialTasks.description: Read the final diff, build results from all three platforms, and both review artifacts together. Verify: (1) Q-exit works — pressing q in pick-and-place and bt-shooter exits promptly without hanging, tested by pick_and_place_quit_exit_test.go and TestRecording_Script_BT_Shooter. (2) Windows compat works — pr_split resolves absolute command paths without spawning subprocesses, ConPTY tests skip gracefully on hosts with broken console init, env blocks are deduplicated. (3) No regressions — existing PATH-based lookup, existing Unix PTY tests, existing game behavior all still work.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: The final diff demonstrably fixes all three categories, passes all three platform targets, and has two contiguous PASS reviews on that same diff. WIP.md is updated with the final status.

continuousVerification.coverageRequirement: All project-defined checks in the all target must pass on macOS, Linux container, and Windows for the same final diff

finalEnforcementProtocol.alert: Do not treat a single-platform pass as success; all three configured targets are mandatory.
If any code changes after Rule of Two pass 1, the contiguous review counter resets to zero.
The review scope is git diff --cached vs HEAD and must remain identical across both review passes.
Keep WIP.md aligned with the latest failure surface, next command, and final review status.
